description_long: This object consists of three small terracotta pots arranged in a rectangular planter box, each containing a flowering plant with slender green stems and purple, star-shaped flowers. The central plant is taller, with a more elongated stem and sparse, small yellowish flowers, while the two side plants have shorter stems and more prominent purple blooms. The planter box is painted in a reddish-brown color with subtle pink and greenish stains, giving it a weathered, urban garden appearance. A white rabbit figurine with pink eyes and inner ears is positioned beside the planter, adding a whimsical touch. The soil in each pot is dark and appears slightly recessed below the rim. The overall composition suggests a decorative urban garden element suitable for sidewalks, patios, or small parks.
description: A rectangular planter box holds three terracotta pots with flowering plants, featuring purple star-shaped blooms and a whimsical white rabbit figurine beside it.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three pots with flowering plants and the rabbit figurine partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the planter, the central plant's height, and the rabbit fully visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the rabbit on the left, showing the back of the planter and the plants' stems.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the rabbit mostly hidden behind the planter and a clear look at the pots' arrangement.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged radially around the center of each flower, forming a star-like pattern with clear symmetry and slight overlapping at the base.
